title: Segfault during 'write_aiger' with simple logic loop `assign x = x & x`
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue
Run `yosys -p "simplemap; write_aiger top.aig" top.v` with what is an obviously badly written piece of Verilog:

```verilog
// top.v
module top(output x);
        assign x = x & x;
endmodule
```

## Expected behavior
Yosys reports an error due to the logic loop, rather than crashing.

## Actual behavior
Yosys segfaults.

```
3. Executing AIGER backend.
Segmentation fault (core dumped)
```
code_blocks:
3. Executing AIGER backend.
Segmentation fault (core dumped)
